hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" != *"/docs/"* && -n "$f" ]] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: You edited a non-docs file. Per CLAUDE.md, if this change adds or modifies a feature, update or create the relevant doc in docs/ before finishing."}}' || true; }
